citations.narrative:
A section of the wolf perimeter (secondary) fence is in disrepair. The top and bottom of the area is held to the post with
plastic zip ties; and the middle section's zip tie holding it to the post broke when I very gently pulled on the section. A well-
maintained perimeter fence is important to protect the animals from unauthorized persons and to serve as a secondary
containment for animals that require it. Ensure to repair this section and maintain the perimeter fence in good repair.
***Correct by 1/29/2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
n
